title: Mr.🆖 ProReader
copyright: Built with ❤️ by Mr.🆖 for students learning English. Powered by {{name}}

settingsBanner.message: Please configure your API Key or Access Password in Settings to use this app.

about.title: About Mr.🆖 ProReader
about.description: Transform any English reading material into an interactive learning experience! 🚀 With AI-powered tools, personalized content, and gamified learning, mastering English reading has never been this exciting!

personalized.title: 🎯 Personalized
personalized.desc: AI adapts content to your age & level (8-18)

gamified.title: 🎮 Gamified
gamified.desc: Learn through fun games, weekly leaderboards & unlock achievements as you progress!

private.title: ☁️ Cloud Sync
private.desc: Your progress syncs automatically—access your data from any device with every sign-in

roles.title: For Schools & Teachers
roles.intro: Complete user management for classrooms and schools! Organize students into classes, assign teachers, track learning progress in real-time, and export detailed reports. Three roles with tailored permissions:

admin.title: 👑 Admin
admin.uploadTexts: Upload reading materials to Text Repository to share with your school

teacher.title: 🎓 Teacher
teacher.uploadTexts: Upload reading materials to Text Repository to share with your classes
teacher.viewAiQuestions: Track questions students ask AI Tutor

ocr.title: 📷 Smart OCR & Text Repository
ocr.desc: Upload images or PDFs to extract text using AI, or browse the Text Repository to select reading materials shared by your school or teachers!

difficulty.title: 📊 Difficulty Analysis
difficulty.desc: Know your text before reading! Get CEFR levels, Flesch Reading Ease, grade level, and 5 scientific readability metrics. Compare original vs adapted vs simplified versions side-by-side!

cefrHighlight.title: 🎨 CEFR Word Highlight
cefrHighlight.desc: See vocabulary difficulty at a glance! Every word color-coded by CEFR level (A1-C2). Toggle levels on/off, see word counts per level, and identify challenging vocabulary instantly.

adaptation.title: ✏️ Level Adaptation
adaptation.desc: AI rewrites text to match YOUR reading level. Switch between Original, Adapted, and Simplified versions instantly.

visual.title: 🧠 Visual Learning
visual.desc: AI generates quick summaries and interactive mind maps to help you understand key concepts and relationships.

tutor.title: 🤖 AI Tutor
tutor.desc: Your personal reading coach! Ask questions, get hints, upload reading comprehension questions for guided help, and learn at your own pace.

sentenceAnalysis.title: 💬 Sentence Analysis
sentenceAnalysis.desc: Click any sentence for a complete AI breakdown: meaning, vocabulary, grammar, language in use, and learning tips!

glossary.title: 📖 Smart Glossary
glossary.desc: Get bilingual definitions (English + Chinese), syllabification, and real-world example sentences from AI for every word you highlight.

flashcard.title: 🃏 Flashcard Review
flashcard.desc: Flip through interactive cards to learn vocabulary. Rate each word (Easy/Medium/Hard) to track your progress. Prioritize hard words for focused review!

spelling.title: 🎮 Spelling Games
spelling.desc: 4 exciting modes: Listen & Type, Letter Scramble, Fill Blanks, and Mixed! Earn streaks and beat your best score!

quiz.title: 📋 Vocabulary Quiz
quiz.desc: Test your vocabulary knowledge with word-to-definition, definition-to-word, and fill-in-the-blank questions.

test.title: 📝 Reading Test
test.desc: 6 question types, 5 skills tested, skill breakdown, retry missed questions, and targeted practice for weak areas!

achievements.title: 🏆 Achievements
achievements.desc: Unlock badges and milestones as you learn! Track your progress across 12 achievement types—from reading sessions to vocabulary quizzes. Every step counts!

tts.title: 🔊 Text-to-Speech
tts.desc: Perfect your pronunciation! Listen to any word, sentence, or paragraph read aloud in natural voice.

wordExport.title: 📄 Word Export
wordExport.desc: Export learning materials as Word documents: adapted text with vocabulary & sentence analysis, glossary, vocabulary quiz, and reading comprehension test (with optional answer keys).

workflow.title: Your Learning Journey
workflow.upload: Select text via image/PDF upload or Text Repository
workflow.summary: Get a quick summary of the content
workflow.mindmap: Explore with an interactive mind map
workflow.adapt: Read text adapted to your level
workflow.tutor: Ask the AI Tutor for help

about.builtWith: Built with ❤️ by Mr.🆖 for students learning English

help.title: Student Information Guide
help.ageSlider: Age Slider: Drag to select your age (8-18). This helps the AI adapt the text to your reading level.
help.estimatedLevel: Estimated Level: Shows the corresponding Hong Kong school level (Primary 3 to DSE) based on your age.
help.usage: Your age is used to determine the complexity of the Adapted and Simplified text versions, making the content easier or more challenging as appropriate.

imageUpload.title: Select Text
imageUpload.supportedFormats: Supported: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, PDF
imageUpload.uploadNew: Click the [+ New Text] button above to start over

help.title: Select Text Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: Choose how you want to load your reading material. You can either upload images or PDFs for AI text extraction or select from pre-saved texts in the Text Repository.
help.features: Features: Two options available - (1) Upload Image/PDF: Upload photos or PDFs of textbooks, worksheets, or articles. AI uses OCR to extract text from images and PDFs. Image files support PNG, JPG, JPEG, and WEBP; you can upload multiple images (one per page). (2) Text Repository: Browse and select texts saved by teachers or shared across schools. Teachers can upload and manage texts for students.
help.usage: Usage: Switch between tabs to choose your method. For Upload Image/PDF: drag and drop or click to select files, then wait for text extraction. For Text Repository: browse available texts and click to load. Click 'New Text' to start over.

repository.title: Text Repository
repository.selectToRead: Select a text below to begin reading
repository.noTextsAdmin: No texts yet. Click "Upload New Text" to add the first one.
repository.name: Display Name
repository.namePlaceholder: Enter a name to help students identify this text
repository.visibilityClassHint: Only students in your classes can see this text
repository.visibilitySchoolHint: Everyone in your school can see this text
repository.visibilityPublicHint: All schools can access this text
repository.selectClassHint: Only students in this class can see this text
repository.selectClassAllHint: All students in your classes can see this text
repository.uploadDesc: Upload one or more images or PDFs. Text will be extracted automatically.
repository.deleteDesc: This will permanently remove the text and its images from the repository. This cannot be undone.
repository.renameDesc: Enter a new display name for this text.
repository.uploadError: Failed to save text to repository
repository.editDesc: Edit the extracted text and visibility for this entry.
repository.importNoTexts: No texts found in import file

extractedText.title: Extracted Text
extractedText.highlightTip: Select a word or phrase in the text below, then click [+ Add to vocabulary]; or select a sentence, then click [🧠 Analyze sentence]; or select any vocabulary, sentence, or paragraph, then click [🔊 Read aloud].
extractedText.analysisDescription: Detailed analysis of the selected sentence

summary.title: Summary
summary.emptyTip: Click the button above to generate a summary of the text

help.title: Summary Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: The Summary section provides a structured overview with a one-sentence TL;DR, main points as bullet points, key vocabulary with bilingual definitions, and a reflection question to help you quickly grasp the content.
help.features: Features: AI generates a structured summary with TL;DR, main points with emojis, key vocabulary (English + Chinese), and an engaging question. Designed for different student levels from Primary to DSE.
help.usage: Usage: Click 'Generate Summary' to create a summary. Use TL;DR for quick understanding, main points for overview, key words for vocabulary building, and the question to think deeper about the text.

adaptedText.title: Text Analysis & Adaptation
adaptedText.emptyTip: Click the button above to adapt the text to your level
adaptedText.simplifiedEmptyTip: Click the button below to create an even simpler version
adaptedText.editPlaceholder: Enter or paste your text here...
adaptedText.editWarningDesc: Saving changes to the original text will clear the adapted text, simplified text, vocabulary highlights, sentence analyses, and glossary as they may no longer match the new text.

tabs.title: Three Text Versions
tabs.original: Original: The extracted text from your uploaded image(s)/PDF(s)
tabs.adapted: Adapted: AI-rewritten text matching your reading level (based on your age)
tabs.simplified: Simplified: An even simpler version for easier understanding

features.title: Interactive Features
features.edit: Edit Original Text: Click the edit button in the Original tab to modify the extracted text. You can correct OCR errors or paste new text. Note: Saving changes will clear all derived content (adapted text, simplified text, vocabulary highlights, sentence analyses, and glossary) as they may no longer match the updated text
features.highlight: Vocabulary Highlighting: Select any word in the Original tab to add it to your vocabulary list. Highlighted words appear with a yellow background
features.tts: Text-to-Speech: Select any word, sentence, or paragraph and click 'Read aloud' to hear natural pronunciation
features.sentenceAnalysis: Sentence Analysis: Select any sentence and click 'Analyze sentence' for detailed AI breakdown including meaning, vocabulary, grammar, and learning tips. Analyzed sentences appear with a blue underline - click them to see the analysis
features.paragraphNav: Paragraph Navigation: Click the O/A/S buttons to jump between corresponding paragraphs (O=Original, A=Adapted, S=Simplified)

difficulty.title: Difficulty Analysis
difficulty.desc: Compare readability metrics across all three versions:
difficulty.metrics: Word count, sentence count, average sentence length, Flesch Reading Ease, and Grade Level
difficulty.cefr: CEFR Word Highlight: See words color-coded by difficulty level (A1-C2)

export.title: Word Export
export.desc: Download your learning materials as a Word document, and optionally:
export.glossary: Include Glossary: Add definitions for your highlighted vocabulary
export.analysis: Include Sentence Analysis: Add detailed breakdowns for analyzed sentences

difficulty.title: Text Difficulty Analysis
difficulty.disclaimer: CEFR levels and word highlights are analyzed using vocabulary frequency data. Flesch Reading Ease and Grade Level are calculated using standard readability formulas.

mindMap.title: Mind Map
mindMap.emptyTip: Click the button above to generate a visual mind map

help.title: Mind Map Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: The Mind Map section visually organizes the key concepts and relationships from your reading material, helping you understand the structure and connections between ideas.
help.features: Features: AI generates an interactive mind map with main topics, subtopics, and their relationships. Toggle 'Chinese' to generate the mind map in Chinese for bilingual learning support.
help.usage: Usage: Click 'Generate Mind Map' to create a visual representation. Use the 'Chinese' toggle to switch between English and Chinese versions. Review the mind map to quickly grasp the text's structure.

readingTest.title: Reading Test
readingTest.generatingWait: Generating reading test... This usually takes 1-2 minutes. Please wait.
readingTest.emptyTip: Click the button above to generate a reading comprehension test (Please wait 1-2 minutes)
readingTest.modeDesc: Navigate through questions one by one
readingTest.chineseDesc: Display Chinese translations for questions and explanations
readingTest.completedTip: Generate a new set of 10 questions to practice more
readingTest.question: Question
readingTest.practiceMissedSkillsDesc: Generate new questions targeting skills you missed
readingTest.practiceGeneratingWait: Generating targeted practice... This usually takes 1-2 minutes. Please wait.

help.title: Reading Test Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: The Reading Test section assesses your comprehension of the reading material through various question types, helping you identify areas of strength and weakness in your reading skills.
help.features: Features: AI generates 10 questions covering 6 types (Multiple Choice, True/False/Not Given, Short Answer, Inference, Vocabulary in Context, Pronoun Reference) and 5 skills (Main Idea, Detail, Inference, Vocabulary, Author's Purpose). Get detailed explanations, skill breakdown, and download as Word document.
help.usage: Usage: Click 'Generate Test' to create questions. Choose 'One Question at a Time' mode for focused practice or answer all at once. Toggle 'Show Chinese' for translations. After submitting, review answers, retry missed questions, or practice weak skills with additional targeted questions.

glossary.title: Vocabulary
glossary.generatingWait: Generating glossary... This usually takes 1-2 minutes. Please wait.
glossary.emptyTip: Click the button above to generate definitions for {{count}} highlighted words (Please wait 1-2 minutes)
glossary.noHighlightedWords: Highlight some words in the Original text first. For best results, we recommend highlighting 10-30 words.
glossary.prioritizeHardDesc: Focus on words you rated as hard first

flashcard.rateCard: How well did you know this?
flashcard.noCards: Generate a glossary first to use flashcards

quiz.title: Vocabulary Quiz
quiz.question: Question
quiz.noQuizWords: Need at least 4 words for quiz
quiz.aboutDesc: Test your vocabulary knowledge with AI-generated questions in multiple formats.

modeDesc.chooseDefinition: Select the correct definition for a given word.
modeDesc.chooseWord: Select the word that matches a given definition.
modeDesc.fillBlank: Fill in the missing word to complete the sentence.

quiz.tipDifficulty: Harder difficulty = less time per question
quiz.tipTime: Time Challenge mode auto-advances when time runs out

help.title: Vocabulary Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: The Vocabulary section helps you learn and master new words from your reading material through multiple interactive learning modes.
help.features: Features: AI generates bilingual definitions (English + Chinese), syllable divisions, and example sentences. Four learning modes: Table (view all words), Flashcard (flip cards with ratings), Spelling (4 game modes), and Quiz (test your knowledge). Both Spelling and Quiz support difficulty levels and Time Challenge mode. You can merge word lists from previous reading sessions to review vocabulary across multiple texts. Merged words are deduplicated, and harder ratings take priority. Download Glossary Table as Word or Excel file; Download Vocabulary Quiz as Word file.
help.usage: Usage: First, highlight words in the 'Original' text tab. Then click 'Generate Glossary' to create definitions. To include words from other sessions, click 'Add words from history' and select the reading sessions. The merged word count is shown in real time. Use the tabs to switch between learning modes. Rate flashcards (Easy/Medium/Hard) to track progress. When the merged pool exceeds 20 words, use the word/question count selector in Spelling and Quiz tabs. Select difficulty and enable Time Challenge for spelling games and quizzes.

spelling.title: Spelling Challenge
spelling.subtitle: Practice spelling {{count}} words
spelling.notEnoughWords: Need at least 3 words for spelling game
spelling.aboutDesc: Practice spelling through interactive games designed to reinforce vocabulary learning.

modeDesc.listen-type: Listen to the word pronunciation and type what you hear. Great for auditory learning!
modeDesc.scramble: Rearrange jumbled letters to form the correct word. A visual puzzle approach!
modeDesc.fill-blanks: Type the missing letters shown as underscores. Focus on specific letter patterns!
modeDesc.mixed: Randomly switches between all modes for variety and comprehensive practice!

spelling.tipStreak: Build streaks for bonus points (+10% per 3 consecutive)
spelling.tipHint: Use hints wisely - they reveal letters but reduce your score

help.title: Learning Progress Guide
help.intro: Track your learning journey through 10 interactive steps. Each completed step shows a checkmark. Click any step to jump to that section.

navigation.title: Quick Navigation
navigation.desc: Click on any step to jump directly to that section. Grayed-out steps unlock after uploading your reading material.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.desc: The progress bar shows your overall completion percentage.

tutor.title: AI Tutor
tutor.welcome: Hi! I'm your reading tutor. Ask me anything about the text!
tutor.welcomeHint: Try selecting a specific word, sentence, or paragraph in the Text Analysis & Adaptation section, and ask about it.

help.title: AI Tutor Guide
help.purpose: Purpose: The AI Tutor is your personal reading assistant that helps you understand any text through interactive conversations. Ask questions, get explanations, and deepen your comprehension.
help.features: Features: Context-aware answers based on your current reading material. Support for text selection - highlight any text to ask about it. Image upload for homework help - upload questions and get step-by-step guidance. Quick question buttons for common queries.
help.usage: Usage: Click the chat icon to open. Type your question or use quick question buttons. Select text in the Text Analysis & Adaptation section first to ask about a specific word, sentence, or paragraph. Upload images of reading questions for guided help. The tutor remembers your conversation for follow-up questions.

quickQuestions.title: Quick Questions:
quickQuestions.mainIdeaQuestion: What is the main idea of this text?
quickQuestions.summarizeQuestion: Can you summarize this text in a few sentences?
quickQuestions.vocabHelpQuestion: What does this word or phrase mean?
quickQuestions.explainQuestion: Can you explain what this text is about?
quickQuestions.helpWithImageStepByStepQuestion: I've uploaded an image of a reading comprehension question. Based on the passage I'm reading, please help me understand and answer this question step by step.
quickQuestions.helpWithImageHintQuestion: I've uploaded a reading question. Please guide me to find the answer myself by giving hints and asking guiding questions, without giving me the answer directly.
quickQuestions.helpWithImageAnswerQuestion: Help me answer this reading comprehension question. Give me the answer with a clear explanation.

history.title: Reading History
history.description: View your reading sessions with learning progress, vocabulary count, and test scores.
history.name: Reading Text

setting.title: Settings
setting.description: Configure general, AI models, text-to-speech, and notifications settings.
setting.autoSpeakFlashcardTip: Automatically read the word aloud when a flashcard loads
setting.showGiveAnswerTip: Show the 'Give Answer' button (requires Jailbreak Mode)
setting.modeTip: In Paid mode, you pay for your AI usage. In Subscription mode, you pay a flat monthly or yearly fee. In EDU mode, Mr.🆖 pays all AI costs for you.
setting.accessPasswordTip: 💡 Get the access password from Mr.🆖
setting.languageTip: The system will auto-select based on your browser
setting.resetSettingWarning: This will clear all your settings and reset the app.

subscription.cancelConfirm: Are you sure? You will lose access at the end of your billing period.
subscription.signInPrompt: Please sign in with Google to use Subscription mode.
subscription.pastDueWarning: Your last payment failed. Please update your payment method.
subscription.canceledInfo: Your subscription ends on {date}. You can reactivate anytime.
subscription.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. You can subscribe anytime.

reminder.emailRemindersTip: Receive a reminder email when you haven't studied for a while
reminder.loginRequired: Sign in to manage email reminder preferences
reminder.unsubscribeSuccess: You have been unsubscribed from reminder emails.
reminder.sendTestTip: Send a test reminder email to yourself to preview how it looks
reminder.testSendFailed: Failed to send test reminder email
reminder.unsubscribeSuccessMessage: You have been unsubscribed from reminder emails. You can re-enable them in Settings > Notifications.
reminder.unsubscribeInvalidMessage: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired. Please check the email or manage your preferences in Settings.
reminder.unsubscribePageMessage: Manage your email notification preferences in Settings > Notifications.

users.descriptionSuperAdmin: Manage all users across all schools. Super-admins can assign any role including admin.
users.descriptionAdmin: Manage users within your school. Admins can assign teacher and student roles.
users.description: Manage user roles. Admins can assign teachers, teachers can manage students.
users.name: Name

classes.descriptionSuperAdmin: Manage all classes across all schools. Create, edit, delete classes and manage members.
classes.descriptionAdmin: Manage classes within your school. Create, edit, delete classes and manage members.
classes.descriptionTeacher: Manage your own classes. Edit class details and manage student members.
classes.description: Manage classes. Teachers can create and edit classes within their school.
classes.name: Class Name
classes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this class? This will remove all student assignments.

members.description: Manage students in this class. Each student can only be in one class.
members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this student from the class?

studentData.descriptionSuperAdmin: View reading session data for all students across all schools. Filter by school and class.
studentData.descriptionAdmin: View reading session data for all students within your school. Filter by class.
studentData.descriptionTeacher: View reading session data for students in your classes. Filter by your classes.

studentData.noSessions: No reading sessions found for this class

schools.name: School Name
schools.domainReadOnly: Domain is auto-detected and cannot be changed
schools.deleteConfirm: Delete school "{{name}}"? Users from this school will become unassigned.
schools.noSchools: No schools found. Schools are created automatically when users sign in.

aiQuestions.descriptionSuperAdmin: Track questions students ask the AI tutor across all schools. Filter by school and class.
aiQuestions.descriptionAdmin: Track questions students ask the AI tutor within your school. Filter by class.
aiQuestions.descriptionTeacher: Track questions students ask the AI tutor in your classes. Filter by your classes.

exportImport.importSuccess: Import complete: {{schools}} schools, {{users}} users, {{classes}} classes, {{memberships}} memberships restored
exportImport.importSuccessFull: Import complete: {{schools}} schools, {{users}} users, {{classes}} classes, {{sessions}} reading sessions restored
exportImport.importInvalidFile: Invalid file: please select a valid backup file

leaderboard.title: Achievements & Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Unlock learning milestones and compete for top ranks

personal.title: Your Progress
personal.noStats: Complete learning activities this week to appear on the leaderboard!
personal.teacherMessage: The My Stats tab tracks student learning progress. Switch to the Leaderboard tab to see how your students are doing.

empty.title: No data yet this week
empty.description: Complete reading sessions, tests, quizzes, and spelling games to earn points and appear on the leaderboard.
empty.noClass: You are not in a class yet. Ask your teacher to add you, or switch to School or Global view.

leaderboard.intro: Climb the ranks by earning points across all learning activities. The more you practice, the higher you soar!

weeklyScore.title: Weekly Score
weeklyScore.desc: Your all-around performance metric. Every reading session, test, quiz, and game contributes points to your weekly total.

streak.title: Reading Streak
streak.desc: Learn every day to keep your streak alive! Consecutive days of practice build momentum—miss a day and you start fresh.

testScore.title: Reading Test
testScore.desc: Your average comprehension test score. Read thoughtfully and answer questions carefully to boost this number.

quizScore.title: Vocab Quiz
quizScore.desc: Average score from vocabulary quizzes. Expand your word knowledge and review regularly to ace these.

spelling.title: Spelling
spelling.desc: Average spelling game score. Practice those tricky words to sharpen your spelling skills.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.desc: Total words you've collected. Explore diverse texts and add new words to your glossary to grow this count.

improvement.title: Improvement
improvement.desc: Your growth compared to last week. Small, steady gains add up to big results over time!

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.desc: Flashcard reviews completed. Rate each card (Easy, Good, Hard) to strengthen your memory and rack up reviews.

tip.title: Pro Tip:
tip.content: Consistency beats cramming! A little practice every day will take you further than one big session per week.

achievements.intro: Unlock badges and milestones as you progress on your learning journey. Each achievement marks a meaningful step forward!

sessions_read.name: Avid Reader
sessions_read.desc: Upload and extract text from reading materials. Every text you process counts toward your progress!

vocabulary_collected.name: Word Collector
vocabulary_collected.desc: Highlight words and generate glossary entries. The more words you gather, the more badges you earn!

flashcard_reviews.name: Memory Master
flashcard_reviews.desc: Swipe through your flashcards daily. Short, frequent sessions beat long cramming—rate each card honestly for best results!

mindmaps_generated.name: Visual Thinker
mindmaps_generated.desc: After reading a new text, click 'Generate Mind Map' to visualize key concepts. Each mind map counts toward your badge!

adapted_texts.name: Text Adapter
adapted_texts.desc: Struggling with a passage? Use 'Adapt Text' to adjust it to your level. Every adaptation brings you closer to this badge!

simplified_texts.name: Simplifier
simplified_texts.desc: When text feels too complex, hit 'Simplify' for a clearer version. The more you simplify, the faster you unlock!

sentences_analyzed.name: Sentence Detective
sentences_analyzed.desc: Highlight any sentence and choose 'Analyze' to break it down. Pick tricky sentences to rack up analyses quickly!

tests_completed.name: Test Champion
tests_completed.desc: Finish reading? Take a reading test right after while it's fresh. Each completed test adds to your count!

targeted_practices.name: Skill Sharpener
targeted_practices.desc: Review your reading test results and practice weak areas. Each targeted practice session speeds up your progress!

spelling_challenges.name: Spelling Bee
spelling_challenges.desc: Play spelling games with words from your glossary. Quick rounds add up—challenge yourself daily!

vocabulary_quizzes.name: Quiz Wizard
vocabulary_quizzes.desc: Test your word knowledge with vocabulary quizzes. Take quizzes right after adding new words while they're fresh!

ai_tutor_questions.name: Curious Learner
ai_tutor_questions.desc: Stuck on something? Ask the AI Tutor! Every question you ask counts—there are no silly questions here!

tip.title: Pro Tip:
tip.content: Focus on variety! Mixing different activities helps you unlock achievements faster and keeps learning fun.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Celebrate your learning milestones
achievements.keepGoing: Keep going to unlock the next level!

sessions_read.hint: Upload and extract text from reading materials

vocabulary_collected.name: Word Collector
vocabulary_collected.hint: Highlight words and generate glossary entries

mindmaps_generated.hint: Generate mind maps from your reading texts

adapted_texts.name: Text Adapter
adapted_texts.hint: Adapt texts to your reading level

simplified_texts.name: Simplifier
simplified_texts.hint: Simplify complex texts for easier reading

sentences_analyzed.name: Sentence Detective

recommendation.readFromRepositoryDesc: Try a fresh text from the Text Repository!
recommendation.repositoryPickedDesc: A randomly selected text from the Text Repository
recommendation.noTextsAvailable: No texts available in the Text Repository right now.
recommendation.uploadFileDesc: Upload photos or PDFs of articles for AI text extraction

readingTest.title: Complete your reading comprehension test
readingTest.description: Test your understanding of the text with reading comprehension questions. See how well you grasped the key ideas!

spellingGame.title: Try the spelling challenge
spellingGame.description: Practice spelling your vocabulary words with a fun, interactive game. Build streaks and earn bonus points!

vocabQuiz.title: Take the vocabulary quiz

highlightWords.description: Mark important words in the text to build your personalized vocabulary list.
